issues.description: DSL missing the passive ability: 'If there is a Character with a cost of 0 or with a cost of 8 or more, this Character can attack Characters on the turn in which it is played.' This is a conditional static effect that should be represented as a separate effect entry with trigger 'OnPlay' and action 'GiveKeyword' (granting 'CanAttackCharactersOnPlayTurn' or similar).
Target specifies 'maxCost:0' but should include 'maxCount:1' or equivalent to represent 'up to 1' constraint clearly.

suggestedDsl.effectText: If there is a Character with a cost of 0 or with a cost of 8 or more, this Character can attack Characters on the turn in which it is played. [On Play] Rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 0.
